properties.sql:
SELECT e.c_code AS envelope, e.c_programme_code AS programme, e.c_currency AS currency,
              e.c_allocated_amount::text AS allocated,
              COALESCE((SELECT sum(c_amount::numeric)/2 FROM app_fd_budget_event
                        WHERE c_envelope_code = e.c_code AND c_event_type='COMMITMENT'), 0)::text AS committed,
              COALESCE((SELECT sum(c_amount::numeric)/2 FROM app_fd_budget_event
                        WHERE c_envelope_code = e.c_code AND c_event_type='EXPENSE'), 0)::text AS expensed,
              (e.c_allocated_amount::numeric -
               COALESCE((SELECT sum(c_amount::numeric)/2 FROM app_fd_budget_event
                         WHERE c_envelope_code = e.c_code AND c_event_type='COMMITMENT'), 0)
              )::text AS available
       FROM app_fd_budget_envelope e WHERE e.c_status='active'
       ORDER BY e.c_programme_code
